title: Poppy PlayCraft (Pianosaurus and other Poppy Playtime characters
description: adds bigger body Pianosaurus as an entity you can tame and mount
body:
This mod will add various characters from the poppy playtime universe to your Minecraft world!

 

**Pianosaurus:**
Pianosaurus will not attack on sight but can defend himself, and hits very hard with a lot of knockback, so iron level gear at least is recommended, especially ranged weapons. this
is only if you want to kill him because you are evil of course,(because why would you do that otherwise?) but if you are not the evil third of Doey or the ceo of mob entertainment, then you can tame him with any raw meat or raw fish
and ride him around, and he will fight for you! he will kick you off if you try to ride him without feeding him because he is scared of dying again (be nice) and he is beeg. he is also very fast because he is beeg and has large strides,
and is immune to fall damage. he does not spawn natuarlly, so you will have to craft a regular piano and combine it with an egg to get his spawn egg. you can make the piano by combining 8 note blocks with a block of gold (cause it matches his heart❤️) you also might take fall damage when dismounting him because of how tall he is so watch out for that. he will follow you as best he can and does not know how to sit so use a boat if you need to i guess. when he dies he drops a music disk of his comercial jingle and a regular piano.

**Poppy:**

Poppy is pretty much worthless right now lol, just couldn't think of something for her to do once i finished the model, since she dosen't do much on her own in any of the chapters. i might have forgotten to even make a way to get her in survival for this 1.1 update, but she's there! i guess...

**Huggy Wuggy:**

Huggy's spawn egg can be crafted by combining rotten flesh and blue wool. He will attack player's on sight and moves slightly faster than a spider. he has a 3 block range for his melee attack, but can't really do anything at range if you have high ground. when he is killed he will drop a music disk of Cg5's chapter 1 song "poison blooms".

 

That's it for now, enjoy the mod!
